name: enterprise-ai-dev-skills
description: Curated Codex skills for enterprise-grade AI software delivery.

localSkills.name: enterprise-ai-dev
localSkills.purpose: Top-level end-to-end workflow for planning, building, verifying, reviewing, and releasing production software.

localSkills.name: awesome-design-md
localSkills.purpose: Lightweight wrapper for using DESIGN.md references in UI work.

upstreamSkills.purpose: Requirements alignment, PRD creation, test-driven work, debugging, and architecture improvement.
Planning, TDD, systematic debugging, code review, verification, and branch completion.
Security best practices and threat modeling.
Security review, UI/UX implementation guidance, and visual QA verdicts.

excludedByDefault.reason: Powerful but large. Prefer minimal/manual install for users who explicitly want the GSD runtime.
Ambitious full workflow stack with runtime assumptions. Prefer official setup instead of copying individual generated skills.
Full runtime is primarily tuned for Codex CLI on macOS/Linux; only lightweight skills are included here.
Excellent learning reference, not a native Codex skill pack.
Research automation pattern, not general enterprise app delivery.
